free_text: CROSS SECTION FOR THE QUASIELASTIC SN-112,116,124(P,N)
AND NI-58(P,N) REACTIONS-A TEST OF THE FORWARD
SCATTERING AMPLITUDE APPROXIMATION.
. LAST CHECKING HAS BEEN DONE.
.A LARGE-VOLUME (2700 CM**3) NEUTRON DETECTOR.
.BY CAJAD.
